DECLARATION OF JMM RE MOTION TO COMPEL (TRANSACTION ID # 15312008) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOX PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, LLC
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-09-2015 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY, 302, PLAINTIFF FOX PROPERTY MANAGEMENT LLC'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY AND IMPOSITION OF SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT PEI YUN SHEN SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED AMENDED RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS, SET ONE, ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $913.80 (PER NOTICE) ARE AWARDED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF FOX PROPERTY MANAGEMENT LLC AND AGAINST DEFENDANT PEI YUN SHEN. SANCTIONS ARE PAYABLE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. COURT TO SIGN PREVAILING PARTY'S PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 16109069)

Off Calendar Jul-19-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-02-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions And Imposition Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF FOX PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, LLC's Motion For Terminating Sanctions And Imposition Of Sanctions is Off-calendar per the request of the moving party. Judge Pro-tem: Peter Van Zandt; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Set For Trial On Apr-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Fox Property Management LLC's unopposed Motion to Compel Responses to Discovery and Imposition of Sanctions is GRANTED. Defendant Pei Yun Shen shall provide verified amended responses to Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set One; and Requests for Production of Documents, Set One within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. The Requests for Admissions, Set One, are deemed admitted. Sanctions in the amount of $913.80 (per notice) are awarded in favor of Plaintiff Fox Property Management LLC and against Defendant Pei Yun Shen. Sanctions are payable within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. COURT TO SIGN PREVAILING PARTY'S PROPOSED ORDER. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
